shell.brandCopy: Manage queue health, model availability, and access controls from one workspace.
shell.deployCopy: Review system capacity, model readiness, and access settings in one place.

dashboard.title: Operational dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor queue health, GPU pressure, and cluster stability without leaving the admin workspace.

completed.label: Completed
completed.helper: Finished generations in the last 24 hours

failed.label: Failed
failed.helper: Tasks requiring retry or operator review

gpu.title: Primary GPU lane
gpu.subtitle: Realtime device telemetry for the busiest render node.

recentTasks.title: Recent tasks
recentTasks.subtitle: Fresh queue movements across priority and default lanes.

nodes.title: Infrastructure nodes
nodes.subtitle: Cluster coverage by zone and GPU family.

tasks.title: Task control room
tasks.description: Inspect throughput, filter the render queue, and spot failures before they fan out.
tasks.searchPlaceholder: Search by task ID, owner, or subject

table.title: Queue backlog
table.subtitle: Current tasks across priority and default queues.

logs.title: Operator log
logs.subtitle: Recent system events across scheduling, rendering, and delivery.
logs.materialStage: Material stage reached 82%, and the preview render is cached.
logs.queueDepth: Queue depth exceeded the recommended threshold on the experimental lane.
logs.edgeNode: Edge node cubie-edge-01 missed heartbeat, and traffic was drained.

models.title: Model inventory
models.description: Track which providers are mounted, syncing, or staged for download across the deployment.
models.importCopy: Attach a manifest, verify checksum metadata, and queue the asset for staged rollout.

apiKeys.title: API key management
apiKeys.description: Review usage, rotate credentials, and keep permissions tightly scoped.

table.title: Issued keys
table.subtitle: Masked credentials with operational metadata only.

createPanel.title: Create a scoped key
createPanel.copy: Issue a scoped key for automation, integrations, or partner traffic without exposing full secrets in the interface.

settings.title: System settings
settings.description: Tune the generation engine, artifact storage, and traffic guardrails from one layered surface.

generation.title: Generation Engine
generation.description: Primary execution model, parallelism, and preview behavior.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Artifact retention and backend routing for generated outputs.

traffic.title: Traffic & Limits
traffic.description: Rate limits, concurrency caps, and allowed control-plane origins.

defaultProvider.label: Default provider
defaultProvider.description: Choose which model receives new jobs when the client does not pin a provider.

maxParallelJobs.label: Max parallel jobs
maxParallelJobs.description: Upper bound of concurrent renders scheduled across the primary cluster.

previewRenderer.label: Preview renderer
previewRenderer.description: Generate preview thumbnails during pipeline execution.

completionWebhook.label: Completion webhook
completionWebhook.description: POST target used after a task reaches the completed state.

artifactBackend.label: Artifact backend
artifactBackend.description: Backend used for previews, meshes, and metadata manifests.

retentionDays.label: Retention window
retentionDays.description: Time to retain generated assets before scheduled cleanup.

signedUrls.label: Signed URLs
signedUrls.description: Wrap artifact downloads in signed URLs when the backend supports it.

artifactPrefix.label: Artifact prefix
artifactPrefix.description: Storage path prefix for generated tasks and preview assets.

rateLimitPerMin.label: Rate limit
rateLimitPerMin.description: Global request budget before keys are throttled.

concurrencyBurst.label: Burst capacity
concurrencyBurst.description: Temporary concurrency ceiling for short spikes in traffic.

priorityQueue.label: Priority queue
priorityQueue.description: Keep a reserved lane for premium or internal operator traffic.

allowedOrigins.label: Allowed origins
allowedOrigins.description: Comma-separated domains allowed to access the admin panel.

preview.title: System overview
preview.copy: Review the current cluster profile, storage strategy, and traffic posture before saving changes.

generate.title: Generate a new 3D asset
generate.description: Upload a source image, refine the prompt, and shape the output format before dispatching the job.
generate.dropTitle: Upload a reference image or choose a sample
generate.sampleFile: A reference image is ready for generation.
generate.promptPlaceholder: Describe material, silhouette, topology or styling details.
generate.promptPreset: Minimal sneaker with layered foam sole, translucent heel support and precise stitch seams.
generate.uploadReady: Reference image updated. This task will use your latest upload.

empty.title: Upload an image to start creating
empty.description: Generate a downloadable 3D model in minutes

gallery.title: Assets
gallery.deleteDescription: After deletion, this record will be removed from your assets.

generations.title: My Generations
generations.description: Review recent jobs, track progress, and reopen completed assets in Viewer.
generations.emptyCopy: Try another filter or return to Generate to start a new task.

viewer.title: 3D Viewer
viewer.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The model and all associated files will be permanently deleted.
viewer.emptyCopy: This model is not available yet.

status.cacheReady: Model data loaded from cache. Parsing…

setup.title: Connect your instance
setup.description: Enter your API Key and service URL to connect your Cubie instance. You can create an API Key in the API Keys page of the admin panel.
setup.helper: These settings are saved on this device. You can update them here at any time.

samplePrompts.sneaker: Minimal sneaker with layered foam sole and translucent heel support.
samplePrompts.headset: Premium over-ear headset with matte aluminum arms and soft fabric cushions.
samplePrompts.lamp: Ceramic lamp with fluted body, satin glaze and wide linen shade.
samplePrompts.chair: Walnut lounge chair with woven seat, rounded arms and subtle bevels.
